mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SUPPORT ( sup_no, sup_cn, sup_ans_cn, sup_reg, sup_reg_hm, sup_ans_reg, sup_ans_reg_hm, reg_no, sup_yn ) VALUES ( SUP_ID_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{supCn}, #{supAnsCn}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), #{supAnsReg}, #{supAnsRegHm}, #{regNo}, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT sup_no, sup_cn, sup_ans_cn, sup_reg, sup_reg_hm, sup_ans_reg, sup_ans_reg_hm, reg_no, sup_yn FROM SUPPORT WHERE sup_no = #{supNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE SUPPORT SET sup_cn = #{supCn}, sup_ans_cn = #{supAnsCn}, sup_ans_reg = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), sup_ans_reg_hm = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), sup_yn = 'Y' WHERE sup_no = #{supNo}
mapper.select: SELECT sup_no, sup_cn, sup_ans_cn, sup_reg, sup_reg_hm, sup_ans_reg, sup_ans_reg_hm, reg_no, sup_yn FROM SUPPORT ORDER BY sup_no DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SUPPORT ( sup_no, sup_cn, sup_ans_cn, sup_reg, sup_reg_hm, sup_ans_reg, sup_ans_reg_hm, reg_no, sup_yn ) SELECT SUP_ID_SEQ.NEXTVAL, '문의사항 내용 ' || LEVEL, '답변 완료 ' || LEVEL, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - LEVEL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - LEVEL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), #{regNo}, 'Y' FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= #{saveSupportDataCount}
